uiRegular.purpose: Default shell, menus, dialogs, explorer, taskbar, package center

uiBold.purpose: Title bars, selected items, group headings, critical dialogs

click.purpose: Beveled button activation, menu item activation, taskbar interaction

icons.style: user-provided win95-winxp icon pack for prototype, plus Aurora-generated fallback pixel art

copyrightPolicy.rule: Use the supplied assets and original Aurora artwork only. Do not copy Microsoft icons, sounds, wallpapers, logos, or system bitmaps.
